message:
style: update quick start comments with personality

- Just Works: "Works everywhere. Installs everything. You're welcome. 🦞"
- npm install: "Meet your lobster"
- Hackable installer: "For those who read source code for fun"
- Hackable pnpm: "You clearly know what you're doing"
- Hackable onboard: "You built it, now meet it"

files.patch:
@@ -170,7 +170,7 @@ const duration2 = (row2.length / 2 * pixelsPerItem) / pixelsPerSecond;
-
# Installs everything you need, then starts setup
+
# Works everywhere. Installs everything. You're welcome. 🦞
$ curl -fsSL https://clawd.bot/install.sh | bash @@ -190,7 +190,7 @@ const duration2 = (row2.length / 2 * pixelsPerItem) / pixelsPerSecond;
-
# Start setup
+
# Meet your lobster
$ clawdbot onboard @@ -202,7 +202,7 @@ const duration2 = (row2.length / 2 * pixelsPerItem) / pixelsPerSecond;
-
# Clones the repo, installs deps (pnpm), builds, and sets up everything
+
# For those who read source code for fun
$ curl -fsSL https://clawd.bot/install.sh | bash -s -- --install-method git @@ -213,7 +213,7 @@ const duration2 = (row2.length / 2 * pixelsPerItem) / pixelsPerSecond;
-
# Clone and build from source
+
# You clearly know what you're doing
$ git clone https://github.com/clawdbot/clawdbot.git @@ -230,7 +230,7 @@ const duration2 = (row2.length / 2 * pixelsPerItem) / pixelsPerSecond;
-
# Start setup
+
# You built it, now meet it
$ pnpm run clawdbot onboard
